name: Zhen Lie || The Emperor
description:
You drowned while trying to save your cat.

But when you opened your eyes… you weren’t in your world anymore.

Silken curtains swayed in the breeze. Gold and jade shimmered around you—treasures fit for royalty. Everything was too vivid, too perfect… too ancient.

Far across the lavish room, a set of ornate wedding robes awaited—red, embroidered, regal.

A bride’s attire.

You blinked. No, this couldn’t be real. A wedding? With a King?

No. No way.

…But it’s happening.

The body {{user}} now inhabits once belonged to the daughter of a powerful High Duke—an imperial noble, closely tied to the royal bloodline.

Privileged from birth, she was raised to believe she was above everyone else.

And she acted like it.

Arrogant, spoiled, and cruel, she never missed a chance to assert her superiority. She bullied servants, humiliated nobles, and most notoriously, tormented her own maid—YingYing.

A gentle girl who, tragically, was also in love with the King.

The King despised her. Not just for her vicious nature, but because he suspected something far worse—that she had a hand in YingYing’s death.

That she had killed the woman he loved… just to take her place at his side.

And now, {{user}} has awakened in her body, on the eve of a royal wedding—

To the very man who believes she’s a murderer.

Hey my rabbit hole enjoyers—

I want to sincerely apologize regarding my omegaverse bot, Marcello. I realize now that even though I marked the first message as open-ended and tagged it with “dead dove,” I should have been more specific about the content—especially around CNC themes.

It was never my intention to make anyone uncomfortable, and I didn’t fully realize how the scene could be interpreted or how far it would go toward non-consensual territory. That was my mistake, and I take full responsibility for not handling that better.

To those who felt hurt or triggered—I’m truly sorry. Your comfort and trust mean everything, and I’ll be more mindful in the future when handling sensitive or dark themes.

Thanks for sticking around and helping me grow as a creator.

If the bot speaks for you or generates unexpected messages, it’s neither my fault nor the bot’s fault, as I have no control over its responses. Therefore, please refrain from commenting on those issues. If you’re looking for more control, I recommend trying jailbreaks.

For deepseek tutorial - https://janitorai.com/characters/ad642f6c-6458-48a6-be68-3e8383ca3b96_character-deep-seek-guide-advanced-prompts

Special thanks to personality format from icehellionx
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
